---
title: "Sampling"
author: "Var Kurapati"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(primer.data)
```

```{r}
#| cache: true
set.seed(10)

truth <- shaming |> 
  pull(age) |> 
  mean(na.rm = TRUE)

samples <- tibble(trial = 1:1000) |>
  mutate(
    sample      = map(trial, ~ shaming |> slice_sample(n = 50)),
    sample_mean = map_dbl(sample, ~ mean(.x$age, na.rm = TRUE)),
    sample_se   = map_dbl(sample, ~ sd(.x$age, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(50)),
    lower       = sample_mean - 1.96 * sample_se,
    upper       = sample_mean + 1.96 * sample_se
  ) |>
  select(-sample)
```

```{r}
samples |> 
  summarize(coverage = mean(lower < truth & upper > truth)) |> 
  pull(coverage)
```

```{r}
ggplot(samples |> slice(1:100), aes(y = trial)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), 
                 height = 0.3, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(aes(x = sample_mean), size = 0.6) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = truth, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "95% Confidence Intervals for Voter Age Means",
    subtitle = "Most sample intervals cross the true population mean, while a few naturally miss.",
    x = "Age (years)",
    y = "Sample Number",
    caption = "Data source: {primer.data}"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
